item.name: Wind-up Lulu
item.description:
“Magic has no limits.” Nor does the list of exciting things you can do with this automaton.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Lulu minion.
item.tooltip:
Let's see how tough you are.
   - Lulu
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 to all enemies within range.
